flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Stephens College fell 65% between 2021 and 2024 (51.8% → 17.9%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 22% at Stephens College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (353 vs 451).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Stephens College fell 20% between 2021 and 2024 (53.2% → 42.7%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Stephens College rose 18% between 2006 and 2009 ($20.5k → $24.1k).
